# Read the provided text file
path = "/mnt/data/file-L4RNxr1Y3tAHksr1ZsP1RT-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:5000]

import re

text = open("/mnt/data/file-L4RNxr1Y3tAHksr1ZsP1RT-text_to_analyse.txt","r",encoding="utf-8").read()

# Let's find all quoted segments in the text to inspect
# segments within double quotes and within Arabic parentheses or curly braces
quoted = []
for m in re.finditer(r'["“](.+?)["”]', text, flags=re.DOTALL):
    quoted.append((m.start(), m.end(), m.group(1)))
len(quoted), quoted[:10]

# find all segments in parentheses
paren = []
for m in re.finditer(r'[(\uFD3E](.+?)[)\uFD3F]', text, flags=re.DOTALL):
    paren.append((m.start(), m.end(), m.group(1)))
len(paren), paren[:20]

curly = []
for m in re.finditer(r'\{(.+?)\}', text, flags=re.DOTALL):
    curly.append((m.start(), m.end(), m.group(1)))
len(curly), curly[:10]

import re

text = open("/mnt/data/file-L4RNxr1Y3tAHksr1ZsP1RT-text_to_analyse.txt","r",encoding="utf-8").read()

citations = []

# 1) Double-quoted citations: pick those that are clearly ayah or hadith
for m in re.finditer(r'["“](.+?)["”]', text, flags=re.DOTALL):
    inner = m.group(1)
    start = m.start()+1
    end = m.end()-1
    # Determine if it's Aya or Hadeeth based on heuristics:
    # If it contains Arabic diacritic-heavy ayah words like "قُلْ" or "يَا بَنِي آدَمَ" or "وَآتِ"
    # or if the nearby context mentions الله تعالى or سورة or الآية
    # If it includes "كلوا واشربوا" it's hadith.
    # The first three quoted are just "السرف"/"التبذير" not citations.
    if inner in ["السرف","التبذير"]:
        continue
    # next one is also "التبذير" again
    if inner.strip() == "التبذير":
        continue
    # Determine type: Search backward 50 chars for "يقول الله" or "باب قول الله" or "سورة"
    context_before = text[max(0, m.start()-60):m.start()]
    ctype = None
    if "النبي" in context_before or "ويذكر النبي" in context_before:
        ctype = "Hadeeth"
    elif "قول الله تعالى" in context_before or "الله تعالى" in context_before or "سورة" in context_before:
        ctype = "Aya"
    else:
        # check content: if starts with common ayah phrases or has diacritics
        if "قُلْ" in inner or "يَا بَنِي" in inner or "وَآتِ" in inner:
            ctype = "Aya"
    if ctype:
        citations.append({"span_start": start, "span_end": end, "span_text": inner, "citation_type": "Aya" if ctype=="Aya" else "Hadeeth"})

# 2) Parentheses containing ayah texts in references
for m in re.finditer(r'\(([^)]*?)\)', text, flags=re.DOTALL):
    inner = m.group(1)
    # filter for those that are verses: they contain Arabic letters and words like وَآتِ/يَا بَنِي/قُلْ
    if any(phrase in inner for phrase in ["وَآتِ ذَا","يَا بَنِي آدَمَ","قُلْ مَنْ حَرَّمَ"]):
        # trim spaces
        inner_stripped = inner.strip()
        # compute new start offset after trimming
        leading_ws = len(inner) - len(inner.lstrip())
        start = m.start()+1+leading_ws
        end = start + len(inner_stripped)
        citations.append({"span_start": start, "span_end": end, "span_text": inner_stripped, "citation_type": "Aya"})
    # exclude "(رواه ابن عباس)"
# 3) Curly braces for ayah
for m in re.finditer(r'\{([^}]*)\}', text, flags=re.DOTALL):
    inner = m.group(1)
    inner_stripped = inner.strip()
    if inner_stripped:
        # let's verify it's the "وَلَا تُبَذِّرْ تَبْذِيرًا"
        # We'll include regardless, it's intended as ayah
        leading_ws = len(inner) - len(inner.lstrip())
        start = m.start()+1+leading_ws
        end = start + len(inner_stripped)
        citations.append({"span_start": start, "span_end": end, "span_text": inner_stripped, "citation_type": "Aya"})

len(citations), citations

# verify slices
text = open("/mnt/data/file-L4RNxr1Y3tAHksr1ZsP1RT-text_to_analyse.txt","r",encoding="utf-8").read()
citations = [{'span_start': 924, 'span_end': 1108, 'span_text': 'وَآتِ ذَا الْقُرْبَى حَقَّهُ وَالْمِسْكِينَ وَابْنَ السَّبِيلِ وَلا تُبَذِّرْ تَبْذِيرًا * إِنَّ الْمُبَذِّرِينَ كَانُوا إِخْوَانَ الشَّيَاطِينِ وَكَانَ الشَّيْطَانُ لِرَبِّهِ كَفُوراً', 'citation_type': 'Aya'},
  {'span_start': 1180, 'span_end': 1307, 'span_text': 'يَا بَنِي آدَمَ خُذُوا زِينَتَكُمْ عِنْدَ كُلِّ مَسْجِدٍ وَكُلُوا وَاشْرَبُوا وَلا تُسْرِفُوا إِنَّهُ لا يُحِبُّ الْمُسْرِفِينَ', 'citation_type': 'Aya'},
  {'span_start': 1374, 'span_end': 1436, 'span_text': 'قُلْ مَنْ حَرَّمَ زِينَةَ اللَّهِ الَّتِي أَخْرَجَ لِعِبَادِهِ', 'citation_type': 'Aya'},
  {'span_start': 1485, 'span_end': 1536, 'span_text': 'كلوا واشربوا والبسوا وتصدقوا في غير إسراف ولا مخيلة', 'citation_type': 'Hadeeth'},
  {'span_start': 3874, 'span_end': 3925, 'span_text': 'كلوا واشربوا والبسوا وتصدقوا في غير إسراف ولا مخيلة', 'citation_type': 'Hadeeth'},
  {'span_start': 3357, 'span_end': 3541, 'span_text': 'وَآتِ ذَا الْقُرْبَى حَقَّهُ وَالْمِسْكِينَ وَابْنَ السَّبِيلِ وَلا تُبَذِّرْ تَبْذِيراً * إِنَّ الْمُبَذِّرِينَ كَانُوا إِخْوَانَ الشَّيَاطِينِ وَكَانَ الشَّيْطَانُ لِرَبِّهِ كَفُوراً', 'citation_type': 'Aya'},
  {'span_start': 3572, 'span_end': 3699, 'span_text': 'يَا بَنِي آدَمَ خُذُوا زِينَتَكُمْ عِنْدَ كُلِّ مَسْجِدٍ وَكُلُوا وَاشْرَبُوا وَلا تُسْرِفُوا إِنَّهُ لا يُحِبُّ الْمُسْرِفِينَ', 'citation_type': 'Aya'},
  {'span_start': 3765, 'span_end': 3827, 'span_text': 'قُلْ مَنْ حَرَّمَ زِينَةَ اللَّهِ الَّتِي أَخْرَجَ لِعِبَادِهِ', 'citation_type': 'Aya'},
  {'span_start': 2380, 'span_end': 2406, 'span_text': 'وَلَا تُبَذِّرْ تَبْذِيرًا', 'citation_type': 'Aya'}]

for c in citations:
    s = text[c['span_start']:c['span_end']]
    assert s == c['span_text'], (c, s)

"All good"
